steps.step1Desc: Register with email and verify to activate your account

faqs.q: How do I create my first avatar?
faqs.a: After logging in, click "Avatars" in the sidebar, then click "New Avatar". Select a style and base model, then customize in the editor.
The primary format is GLTF/GLB. FBX is auto-converted on upload. Textures support PNG, JPG, HDR, EXR.
Export as GLB (universal 3D format), VRM 1.0 (VTuber/avatar format), and 4K PNG high-quality screenshots.

faqs.q: How do I apply for workspace admin permissions?
faqs.a: Go to "Settings → Enterprise SSO" to submit an application. After admin approval, you can manage workspace resources and upload templates to the marketplace.

faqs.q: Can marketplace templates be used commercially?
faqs.a: Official templates clearly indicate license types (CC0/CC-BY/Commercial). Check each template's license. Paid templates can be used commercially after purchase.

faqs.q: What if I forget my password?
faqs.a: Click "Forgot password?" on the login page. A reset link will be sent to your registered email. SSO users should contact their enterprise IT admin.

apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.authHeaderDesc: For authenticated requests, add the Authorization header:
apiDocs.tokenStep1: On login success, access_token is returned in the response body (valid for 15 minutes)
apiDocs.tokenStep2: refresh_token is set via httpOnly cookie (valid for 7 days)
apiDocs.tokenStep3: When access_token expires, call POST /api/auth/refresh to get a new token
apiDocs.tokenStep4: refresh_token uses rotation mechanism — old token is immediately invalidated after each refresh
apiDocs.limitItem3: Phone number, WeChat, QQ and other third-party social logins are not supported
